title: ClipResult
description: JSONL result output for the `clip` command (type=result, stage=clip).

url.description: Original clipped URL (empty string for --text clips).

source_type.description: Adapter source type (e.g. web, github, weibo).

folder.description: Absolute path to the clip storage folder.

markdown.description: Absolute path to the saved Markdown file.

tags.description: LLM-extracted tags (empty array if LLM is not configured).

category.description: LLM-generated category (empty string if LLM is not configured).

duplicate.description: Present and true when the URL was already clipped.

existing_id.description: When duplicate=true, the existing clip's record ID.
